name: Shrimp Pasta
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Fresh pasta (angel hair, spaghettini, pastina, orzo, riso, or bowties)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and devein the shrimp, leaving the swimmer intact.
2. Bring 4 quarts of cold, salted water to a boil over high heat on the stove.
3. Heat the oil in a skillet over high heat.
4. Add the shrimp and cook for 1 minute, tossing or stirring.
5. Add the wine and cook for an additional 3-to-4 minutes.
6. Remove from heat and whisk in the butter and chopped parsley.
7. Meanwhile, add the pasta to the boiling water and cook to desired doneness.
8. Drain and toss with the shrimp.
9. Place on a serving platter or in a large serving bowl and serve immediately.
